title: The War Room
storySnippet: In the fortress war room, maps and dispatches cover every wall. Only those with expert-level spelling can decode the messages.

data.sentenceContext: My grandmother is a connoisseur of fine teas from around the world.
The teacher served as a liaison between the parents and the school administration.
The pilot had to maneuver the aircraft through a narrow mountain pass during the storm.
The turn of the millennium in the year 2000 was celebrated with fireworks worldwide.
The team conducted a reconnaissance of the trail before leading the group on the hike.
Security cameras provide surveillance of the school parking lot during events.
Her quiet acquiescence to the new rules surprised everyone who expected her to argue.
The Mars rover named Perseverance was designed to search for signs of ancient life.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The spy plane was sent on a ___ mission to gather information.
data.hint: Double 's' near the end, and two 'n's
